_meta.description: Machine-readable architecture schema for 3PMO-Hub. Read this before making structural changes to any tab or service. Keep in sync with ArchitectureTab.tsx and 03-artifacts/system-architecture.md.
_meta.firebase_plan: Blaze (required for Cloud Functions external API calls)

navigation.layout: flat sidebar with visual group labels

tabs.name: Workflow
tabs.description: Renders workflow-diagram.html in a full-height iframe. No live data.

tabs.name: Brand
tabs.description: Static brand reference. Displays 3PMO theme (green/gold/Verdana) and Work theme (red/white/Helvetica) colour swatches and usage rules.

tabs.name: Architecture
tabs.description: This architecture reference page. Update LAST_UPDATED constant on any structural change.

tabs.name: Cost Tracker

data_sources.description: Daily cost entries per AI provider (claude, gemini, antigravity)
Latest Claude token snapshot written by fetchClaudeUsage Cloud Function

data_sources.name: fetchClaudeUsage
data_sources.description: Calls Anthropic Admin API to fetch Claude Code usage. Writes snapshot to RTDB. Has ~1 hour freshness delay. Requires ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY secret.

tabs.description: Tracks token usage and estimated costs for Claude Pro, Gemini Pro, and Antigravity. 7-day line chart (Recharts). Gemini and Antigravity data is entered manually.

tabs.name: Issue Tracker

data_sources.access: authenticated create/update; universal read; delete prohibited
data_sources.description: All bugs and enhancements across all projects. SSOT for issue tracking.

data_sources.access: authenticated create/update; universal read; delete prohibited
data_sources.description: Project registry. Also maintained in src/assets/projects.json for dropdown.
Local project list for dropdowns. Synced from Drive via scripts/sync-registry.mjs at build time.

tabs.description: Full issue management. CRUD for bugs and enhancements. 4-stage test cycle (Compile → DoD → SIT → UAT). AI-powered Definition of Done generation. Voice capture via Web Speech API. Priority levels P0–P4.

tabs.name: Organiser

data_sources.description: Per-user thought entries. Keyed by Firebase UID.

tabs.description: Personal idea and task capture. Each thought scored by impact (1-10), effort (1-10), urgency (1-10). Priority formula: (impact + (11 - effort) + urgency + weight) / 4. Supports voice input. Filter by category and status.

tabs.name: Pairwise
tabs.description: Decision-making tool. Input a list of options; compare them two at a time; receive a ranked output. 4 view modes: List, New, Compare, Results.

tabs.name: To-Do

data_sources.description: Reads user's Google Task lists. Up to 50 lists, 100 tasks per list. Filters completed/hidden items.

tabs.description: Read-only view of the user's Google Tasks. No separate task system — surfaces existing Google Tasks directly.

cloud_functions.name: fetchClaudeUsage
cloud_functions.description: Calls Anthropic Admin API endpoint /v1/organizations/usage_report/claude_code. Falls back to yesterday if today's data not ready (~1hr delay). Writes snapshot to RTDB hub_status/token_usage/claude. Requires ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY Firebase Secret.

cloud_functions.name: onIssueWrite
cloud_functions.description: Recalculates open issue counts per project after any issue change. Segregates backlog_bugs vs backlog_enhancements. Excludes statuses: Done, Closed, Parked.

cicd.note: Never run firebase deploy manually for production. Use git push to master.

adding_a_new_tab: 1. Create src/tabs/NewTab.tsx as a React FC
2. Add the tab ID to the Tab enum in App.tsx
3. Add it to the correct group in App.tsx navigation
4. Add a case in the tab renderer switch
5. If using Firestore: follow existing onSnapshot pattern in IssueTrackerTab or StatusTab
6. If using RTDB: follow onValue pattern in OrganizerTab or PairwiseTab
8. Update this file (architecture.json) to add the new tab entry
10. Commit on branch agent/{tool}/{project}/{issue-id} — never directly to master
patterns_for_ai.firestore_rules_pattern: Universal read; authenticated create/update with field validation; delete prohibited. See firestore.rules.
patterns_for_ai.rtdb_rules_pattern: hub_status/token_usage and hub_cost_tracker are public read/write (cost data). All other paths require Firebase Auth.
patterns_for_ai.pr_pattern: gh pr create && gh pr merge --auto --squash
